findings.detail: Flat LR pipeline (R1→L1→L2→L3→R2) renders cleanly: 5 evenly-spaced boxes, no overlaps, no truncation, 12px subtitles legible, edge labels ('git clone (once)', 'git add', 'git commit', 'git push') sit on arrows without collision, color tiers (blue start / purple action / green done) are consistent. Cycle-1 failures whitespace_imbalance and side_panels_hollow are fully resolved by the subgraph removal.
